Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Blood Shadows]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — Blood Shadows are used by Redmoon Hall vassals to take control.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Blood Shadows are dispersed by the Bleeding Phoenix to gather power for new bodies.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — Blood Shadows are part of Redmoon Hall.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — The Sage of Red Faith encourages the spreading of Blood Shadows on the wild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Redmoon Overlords summoned Blood Shadows around their weapons.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Blood Shadows are entities that Little Blue can feed on.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Absorbing and purifying Blood Shadows helped Little Blue's understanding of spirits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — Blood Shadows in the shape of birds screeched overhead.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
